name: StudyDesign
title: DRKS Study Design
description: Study design codes for DRKS-registered studies that are not covered by the standard HL7 study-design code system (SEVCO). To be used in combination with the standard code system.

concept.definition: There are no comparison groups. All study participants/subjects receive the same intervention throughout the study.

Comparison of several alternative treatments and their combination. In a 2 x 2 design with 2 different treatments, participants receive either treatment A or treatment B, both treatments combined or neither treatment.
The assignment type does not fit any of the defined categories.
The caregiver is blinded to the intervention or observation group assigned to the participant.
Study analysing data collected after the start of the study
